untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pair trading mechanics with cointegration testing (ADF p-value), spread calculation between two securities, and multi-security correlation analysis. The backtest engine only supports single-security indicators. Critical components missing: (1) Cointegration test (ADF p-value < 0.01), (2) Price spread between paired equities, (3) Spread mean/std deviation calculations, (4) Multi-security relative divergence detection. These require external pair selection and relationship validation outside the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading strategy requiring cointegration analysis and relative value mechanics between two securities. The allowed indicators are single-security technical indicators and cannot express the inter-security spread, cointegration relationship, or mean reversion of the spread itself. A proper implementation would need: (1) pre-selected cointegrated pairs from sector screening, (2) spread = price_A - price_B calculation, (3) z-score of spread vs. historical mean, (4) holding period tracking. Recommend: create a separate pairs screening module and pass pre-validated pairs to the backtest engine with derived spread indicators.
